title: Grona hirta
properties: Grona hirta, also known as hairy grass or hairy lemongrass, has been used in traditional medicine for its various therapeutic properties. It is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being. The plant is also thought to have antimicrobial properties, which can help fight off infections and promote wound healing. Additionally, Grona hirta is said to have a calming effect, reducing stress and anxiety. Its leaves are often used in herbal teas to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
parts: Grona hirta is commonly known as the hairy onion or wild garlic, however, I am unable to verify the medicinal parts of this plant, more research would be required.
